commands.review_summary:
The PR conditionally preserves silent OpenAI-compatible `tool_calls` that arrive with `finish_reason: stop` in both the agent transport stream assembler and the legacy `openai-completions` provider path, while keeping visible-text and incomplete-stream guards.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +143. Total +159 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: on current main, mocked OpenAI-compatible chunks with structured `tool_calls`, no visible text, and `finish_reason: stop` map to `stop` and then lose the tool-call block. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor real behavior proof or maintainer override, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(openai): keep stop-finished tool calls
target.body:
Fixes #88791

## Summary

- Preserve silent structured OpenAI-compatible tool calls when providers stream `tool_calls` but finish with `finish_reason: stop`.
- Keep stripping tool calls for visible-text `stop` responses, `length`/error completions, and transport streams that never emitted a final finish reason.
- Cover both the transport stream assembler and the legacy `openai-completions` provider path.

## Verification

- `pnpm format -- src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: structured `tool_calls` paired with `finish_reason: stop` no longer get stripped into a silent terminal assistant turn when there is no visible assistant text.

Real environment tested: local Codex worktree with hydrated dependencies.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: targeted Vitest proof passed with `7` provider tests and `218` agent transport tests; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: silent `stop` + structured tool-call streams are normalized to `toolUse`, while visible-text `stop` responses and missing-finish streams still strip tool-call blocks.

What was not tested: a live vLLM/OpenAI-compatible provider run and broad CI.
target.author: monkeyleet
